scripts.pack: pnpm --filter @zahnerflow/types build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-flowgram build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-desktop build && pnpm -w backend:dist && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: pnpm --filter @zahnerflow/types build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-flowgram build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-desktop build && pnpm -w backend:dist && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm --filter @zahnerflow/types build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-flowgram build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-desktop build && pnpm -w backend:dist && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: pnpm --filter @zahnerflow/types build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-flowgram build && pnpm --filter zahnerflow-desktop build && pnpm -w backend:dist && electron-builder --win --x64
